channel.title: Xiaomi 15T Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 15T Pro MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSTRXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Turkey

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSTRXM | 16.0

Size: 8.7 GB

MD5: ba9830c2e2e8ca50f8eeb3d544a818ed

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSIDXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Indonesia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Indonesia

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSIDXM | 16.0

Size: 9.2 GB

MD5: ffe674c67abd878c1740b525bec10a7a

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSJPXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Japan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Japan

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSJPXM | 16.0

Size: 9.0 GB

MD5: dddb1afaa8d05d5a336633ae208956c3

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSRUXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSRUXM | 16.0

Size: 9.8 GB

MD5: f844db0c7673a9c1328e29998c86c719

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSTRXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Turkey

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSTRXM | 16.0

Size: 7.3 GB

MD5: 40683748f40e38fa7d57b6fe92154611

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here

New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSTWXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSTWXM | 16.0

Size: 8.3 GB

MD5: bd5bace97ea3d186e40de9e687f6e543

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions
Fix: An issue where macOS compressed files didn't display properly in File Manager in some cases
Fix: Stuttering when loading multilingual screenshot thumbnails in some cases
[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSJPXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Japan
item.description:

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSJPXM | 16.0

MD5: 2e99a764ce7fe94d9f92b02346d5a71c

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSRUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSRUXM | 16.0

Size: 7.2 GB

MD5: f84c215a8439f712f6a06235928fa19c

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps

New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time

New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.301.0.WOSTWXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Taiwan
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Taiwan

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.301.0.WOSTWXM | 16.0

Size: 7.1 GB

MD5: 9b060bc76dc10337ab8c00a02970b07c

Changelog:
[Comprehensive system app optimization]
Camera:
New: A one-tap download for the "Mi-LOG to Rec.709" color conversion LUT file from the Pro video intro page in Camera settings
Optimization: Added a preset management page and support for bulk import/export of preset parameters for Pro mode

Recorder:
Fix: An occasional recording error during long recordings
Fix: Duplicate recording entries in some cases

Calendar:
Optimization: Holiday display in Calendar, with more traditional festivals and historical commemorative days
Fix: An issue where dates displayed incorrectly in some cases

Other improvements:
New: Clarity mode brings together text and icon size, ringtone volume, scam call blocking, and other phone settings
New: The option to tap the status bar to return to the top of the page in some apps and scenarios
Optimization: Mi Mover now supports transferring more data, including some settings and user data from system apps
Optimization: Gallery search animations for smoother transitions

[Interconnectivity]
New: Tap the NFC area on your Xiaomi phone or iPhone to quickly share recordings and notes
New: Xiaomi phones now support AirPods, including fast pair pop-ups, battery status, Spatial Audio, noise cancellation switching, and Find My
New: After SMS verification codes received on iPhone are synced to your Xiaomi phone, they can be detected and copied with one tap
Optimization: When you open Xiaomi phone apps in while using Screen Mirroring on iPhone, you can use the input method set on your Xiaomi phone at the same time
[Privacy and security]
New: More system apps now support Private access, with ongoing compatibility improvements for additional apps
Optimization: Updated "Fingerprints, face data, and screen lock" page layout for easier, faster setup

Updated the security patch to June 2026. Increased system security.

item.description:

Codename: klimt

Version: OS3.0.302.0.WOSMIXM | 16.0

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to June 2026. Increased system security.

Incremental Update: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.201.0.VOSRUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Russia

Codename: klimt

Version: OS2.0.201.0.VOSRUXM | 15.0

Size: 6.7 GB

MD5: 02fde6786d3355ecac2b65e2556c077b

Changelog:
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Immersive effect for full screen indicator in certain scenarios
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Stability of animations when opening and closing apps
Fix: Gestures didn't work properly in certain scenarios
Fix: Issues with animations when opening or closing apps
Fix: Wallpapers disappeared in rare cases when opening or closing apps
Fix: Occasional display glitches when opening or closing apps
Updated the security patch to July 2025. Increased system security.
[Lock screen]
New: Lock screen wallpapers now support lens effect
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.203.0.VOSEUXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro EEA
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro EEA

Codename: klimt

Version: OS2.0.203.0.VOSEUXM | 15.0

Size: 6.8 GB

MD5: 60b65b3b731cdb719a720780d2637221

Changelog:
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Immersive effect for full screen indicator in certain scenarios
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Stability of animations when opening and closing apps
Fix: Gestures didn't work properly in certain scenarios
Fix: Issues with animations when opening or closing apps
Fix: Wallpapers disappeared in rare cases when opening or closing apps
Fix: Occasional display glitches when opening or closing apps
Updated the security patch to July 2025. Increased system security.
[Lock screen]
New: Lock screen wallpapers now support lens effect
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Enhanced watermark features:
· Film frame watermark now supports black or white backgrounds and appears during dynamic shot playback.
· The standard watermark supports custom positioning.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.201.0.VOSMIXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15T Pro Global
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15T Pro Global

Codename: klimt

Version: OS2.0.201.0.VOSMIXM | 15.0

Size: 6.8 GB

MD5: c6a96f80d3c3715ee7d9bfd459731f5a

Changelog:
[Basic experience]
Optimization: Tweaked the Storage refresh algorithm so it activates more often
[System animations]
Optimization: Interrupt animation when entering subpages within apps
Optimization: Interrupt animation during app transitions
Optimization: Interrupt animation when closing apps in Landscape mode
[System]
New: Home screen wallpaper now supports a blur effect
Optimization: Immersive effect for full screen indicator in certain scenarios
Optimization: Updated styles for some classic pages
Optimization: Animation effects when launching apps
Optimization: Scrolling performance on content feeds in some third party apps
Optimization: Stability of animations when opening and closing apps
Fix: Gestures didn't work properly in certain scenarios
Fix: Issues with animations when opening or closing apps
Fix: Wallpapers disappeared in rare cases when opening or closing apps
Fix: Occasional display glitches when opening or closing apps
Updated the security patch to July 2025. Increased system security.
[Lock screen]
New: Lock screen wallpapers now support lens effect
New: Customizable Lock screen shortcuts
[Camera]
All-new design
Brand-new visual language: A more professional visual style provides a deeper sense of immersion while shooting.
· Structure optimization: We streamlined the feature menus and optimized the settings page.
Pro mode upgrade: Adjusted the interface layout and combined parameter options to reduce preview obstruction and help you focus on your creative process.
Enhanced watermark features:
· Film frame watermark now supports black or white backgrounds and appears during dynamic shot playback.
· The standard watermark supports custom positioning.
Expanded personalization settings: Added support for multiple camera interface color schemes.
[Settings]
Optimization: Added a shortcut to system navigation settings in Home screen settings
[Status bar, Notification shade]
New: Some status bar icons now support custom display
[Accessibility]
Fix: Touch gestures stopped working in TalkBack mode
Fix: Volume buttons didn't work in TalkBack mode
Fix: Issues that prevented Recorder from capturing TalkBack audio
Fix: Issues with announcements for unselected items in Calendar and other apps
Fix: Some buttons weren't announced in several apps, including Settings, Control center, Messaging, Contacts, Weather, Notes, and Browser

Download: Here
